title: Biogen Inc. (BIIB) Up 4.7% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Continue?
text: Biogen Inc. (BIIB) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock?

title: 3 Biotech Stocks That Are Revolutionizing Healthcare in 2023
text: The biotechnology (or biotech) sector is a crystal-clear illustration of risk and reward. Many biotech companies work on drugs and therapeutics for some of the most pernicious conditions affecting our society and healthcare system.

title: 1 Major Advantage Biogen May Have Over Pharma Giant Eli Lilly in a Multibillion-Dollar Market
text: Biogen and Eli Lilly both have promising Alzheimer's drugs that have shown they are effective in slowing the rate of cognitive decline in patients. They both come with risks related to brain swelling and brain bleeding, and trial participants have died.

title: Health Canada Accepts New Drug Submission for Lecanemab as Treatment for Early Alzheimer's Disease
text: TOKYO and CAMBRIDGE, Mass., May 15, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Eisai Co., Ltd. (Headquarters: Tokyo, CEO: Haruo Naito, "Eisai") and Biogen Inc. (Nasdaq: BIIB, Corporate headquarters: Cambridge, Massachusetts, CEO: Christopher A. Viehbacher, "Biogen") announced today that Health Canada has accepted a New Drug Submission (NDS) for lecanemab (brand name in the U.S.: LEQEMBI™), an investigational anti-amyloid beta (Aβ) protofibril* antibody, for the treatment of early Alzheimer's disease (mild cognitive impairment due to Alzheimer's disease (AD) and mild AD dementia) with confirmed amyloid pathology in the brain.

title: Jim Cramer expects defensive stocks to be resilient as debt ceiling talks drag on
text: CNBC's Jim Cramer is looking to 2011 for investing guidance during the ongoing debt ceiling uncertainty.

title: These 2 Pharma Stocks Might Face Off Soon -- but They Could Both Win
text: Two new medicines are going to compete for the Alzheimer's therapy market. Eli Lilly's candidate appears to be more effective, but it isn't approved yet.

title: 3 Reasons to Buy Biogen Stock (and 1 to Sell)
text: Biogen has been struggling in recent years, but a couple of new products could help bolster its top line. The stock trades at a discount, which may be an opportunity, especially given the potential for Leqembi.

title: Biogen Stock Hits Fresh High on Eli Lilly Buzz
text: The shares of Biogen Inc (NASDAQ:BIIB) are enjoying tailwinds from positive news surrounding sector peer Eli Lilly's (LLY) Alzheimer's drug  donanemab.

title: Eli Lilly Surges After Alzheimer's Treatment Succeeds; Biogen Also Rises
text: Eli Lilly stock popped Wednesday after the company said its experimental Alzheimer's treatment significantly slowed cognitive decline. The post Eli Lilly Surges After Alzheimer's Treatment Succeeds; Biogen Also Rises appeared first on Investor's Business Daily.

title: Biogen prices new ALS treatment at $14,230 per vial
text: Biogen Inc. BIIB has priced its recently approved ALS treatment Qalsody at $14,230 per vial, a spokesperson confirmed to MarketWatch on Tuesday. The drug, also known as tofersen, was granted accelerated approval by the U.S. Food and Drug Administration last week.
